by_click: Through this click, you can easily start the consultation process for new patients.
taking-harmful-substance: Are you taking any harmful substance?
special-diet: Are you on a special diet?
surgery-history: Do you have any surgery history?
basic-health-checkup: Welcome to Basic Health Checkup. Please click on the touch here to begin.
temperature: Welcome to the temperature measurement. Please switch on the thermometer. Once the device display appears, click “Yes” on the screen. When the “Click Here” option appears, select it. Hold the thermometer approximately 10 cm from the person and press the trigger to capture the temperature reading.
height: Welcome to the height measurement. Please stand under the sensor facing the kiosk. Select 'Click Here' to start the reading, and remain still. select 'Next' once the result appears on the screen.
weight: Welcome to the weight measurement. Step onto the weighing scale without footwear. Once the device display appears, click “Yes” on the screen. When the “Click Here” option appears, select it and stand still until the measurement completes. Tap “Next” once the weight is displayed.
audio-instruction: Listen to audio instruction before pressing start.
glucose_insert: Welcome to the glucose meter station. Please insert the test strip into the glucose meter device. Ensure it is properly inserted for accurate readings and then click on next.
glucose_niddle: Gently puncture your fingertip with the lancet to draw a small drop of blood and then click on next
glucose_blood: Apply the blood to the designated area on the test strip.click on next and  Wait for the glucose meter to display the blood sugar level.
bp: Welcome to the blood pressure measurement. Sit upright, stay silent, and Select 'Start' on the screen. Wait for the values to appear on the BP device, then Select 'Process Finished' followed by selecting 'Next'.
ecg: Welcome to the ECG measurement. Place your fingers and ankle as shown, Select 'Start', and hold still for 30 seconds. Once the result appears, Select 'Next' to proceed.
name: Name :
press_hold_2secs: Press and hold the button on the back of blood pressure monitor for 2 seconds.
p_display_instruction: When the P flashes on the device's display, it's ready for pairing.
delete?: Are you sure you want to delete
glucose_connect_instruction1: 1. Turn Off the meter if it's on
glucose_connect_instruction2: 2. Long Press the bottom button on the right side of the meter for 3 seconds,until the Bluetooth symbol shows up on the meter's display.
device_support?: Checking is device is supported or not..
device_added: The device has been successfully added.
glucose_pairing_instruction1: Find the code on the back of the meter
glucose_pairing_instruction2: If the input field does not appear on your phone, check your notifications
search_patient: Search with Patient Id or Mobile number
input_info: Kindly type any value into the search field.
device_add_alert: Please add the required devices to proceed.
unstable_connection: Unstable connection. Please check your internet connection...
please_wait_connect_shortly: Please wait we will connect you shortly...
doctor_not_available: Doctor is not available. Please reconnect.
checking_doctor_availability: Checking Doctors Availability will connect you shortly...
proceed_for_consultation: Do you want to Proceed for consultation?
bp_alert: Please put the bp cuff to proceed process
bp_information1: Have you put the BP cuff?
bp_information2: 1. Wait for the BloodPressure device to display the blood Pressure values
glucose_instructions1: 1. Please insert the test strip into the glucose meter device and ensure it is properly inserted for accurate readings
glucose_instructions2: 2.Gently puncture your fingertip with the lancet to draw a small drop of blood
glucose_instructions3: 3. Click on 'Next' button below. After clicking, apply the blood sample to the test strip.
glucose_instructions4: 1. Wait for the glucose meter to display the blood sugar level
technical_glitch: Your call is disconnected due to a technical glitch.
disabled_module: Both Consultation & Vitals modules are disabled
enable_module: Please enable at least one module to continue.
payment_back_indication: Note : Do not press back or close the tab.
value_on_bp: after displaying value on BloodPressure device
video_call_alert: You are middle in the call you can't go back
spo2_note: Please turn on the spo2 device to connect.
spo2_instructions1: 1.Insert your index or middle finger fully into the clip, nail facing up.
spo2_instructions2: 2.Press the start button on device and click on next .
spo2_voice: Welcome to the SPO2 station. Please Insert your index or middle finger fully into the SpO₂ clip with the nail facing up. Once the device display appears, click “Yes” on the screen. When “Click Here” appears, select it and press the start button on the device. Wait until the reading stabilizes, then tap “Next.”
weight_instructions1: 1. Step onto the weighing scale without footwear. Once the device display appears, click “Yes” on the screen. When the “Click Here” option appears, select it and stand still.
weight_instructions2: 2. Wait until the on-screen timer finishes. Once your weight appears, tap 'Next' to proceed.
temperature_instructions1: 1. Turn on the device and tap “Yes” on the screen. When the “Click Here” option appears, select it. Hold the thermometer approximately 10 cm from the person and press the trigger.
temperature_instructions2: 2. You'll hear a beep when it's done (within 1 second). Once the result appears, tap 'Next' to proceed.
height_instructions1: 1. Stand under the sensor, face the kiosk, and remain still until the reading completes. Tap Next once the result appears.
eyeWithout: We will check your sight without Phoropter.
eyeWith: We will check your sight with Phoropter.
eyeColor: We Will finish with a quick color test
app_agree: By using this app, you agree to the
term_1: 1. I voluntarily agree to consult with a doctor using this device.
term_2: 2. I understand the limitations of remote consultations, including the inability to perform physical examinations.
term_3: 3. I consent to the collection, storage, and secure use of my health data in compliance with applicable laws.
scan_qr_history: Please scan the QR code to upload past history.
spiro_instructions1: Take the biggest breath and fill your lungs completely.
spiro_instructions3: Blast out air like blowing up a balloon.
spiro_instructions4: Keep going until you can't breathe out anymore.
spyro_instruction1: Make sure your SafeySpirometer is powered on and in pairing mode.
camp_instruction1: No active camp found. Please create a camp to proceed.
weight_instructions:
Make sure:
• HeartRate Scale is ON
• Device is in range
• Location services are ON
• Bluetooth is enabled
temp_instruction2:
Thermometer not found. Please ensure:
• Device is turned ON
• Device is in range
• Try pressing the power button.
bp_instruction1:
Blood Pressure device is not added.
Please pair/add the device first.
spo2_instruction1:
SPO2 device is not added.
Please pair/add the device first.
eye_history_question: Do you have any previous eye problems?
select_symptoms: Select all symptoms you are currently experiencing
wear_glasses_contacts: Do you wear glasses or contacts?
enter_observations: Enter detailed observations, findings, and recommendations...
retake_warning: This will discard the current report and start a fresh Eye test. Continue?
no_aisteth_devices: No AiSteth devices found. Please pair your AiSteth device first.
aisteth_instruction1: Pair your AiSteth device with this phone via Bluetooth settings
aisteth_instruction2: Tap the circular 'TOUCH HERE' button to connect
aisteth_instruction3: Once connected, tap again to start recording
aisteth_instruction4: Place the stethoscope and record heart sounds
keep_device_steady: Keep the device steady and minimize ambient noise for best results
processing_data: Please wait while we process your data...
retake_recording_warning: This will clear the current analysis and take you back to start a new recording. Continue?
truehb_insert: Well come to Hemoglobin test, insert a TrueHB test strip into the device and press Start.
truehb_instructions2: Verify that the batch code is correct.
truehb_instructions3: Insert a fresh test strip into the device and press Start Test.
truehb_instructions4: Apply a drop of blood to the strip tip and wait for the result.
turn_on_temperature_device: Please turn on the Temperature Device to connect
no_devices_found: No devices found. Make sure your device is turned on
temperature_device_not_added: Temperature device is not added. Please pair/add the device first
weight_device_not_added: Weight scale device is not added. Please pair/add the device first.
connect_weight_device: Let's connect your Weight Scale Device
turn_on_weight_device: Please turn on the Weight Scale Device to connect
no_weight_devices_found: No devices found. Make sure your Weight Scale is turned on.
device_limit_info: You can register 1 OMRON connect device for measurement scan. Existing device will be replaced.
